input[type=\"checkbox\"].background: rgb(7, 20, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(0, 255, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(7, 20, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(7, 20, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(13, 2, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(13, 2, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(13, 2, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

progress.background: rgb(11, 42, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table.background: rgb(6, 22, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(3, 13, 6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(10, 32, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(10, 32, 21) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
